ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workclass (e.g., State-gov, Private) */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight (fnlwgt) of the individual */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad) */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marital status (e.g., Never-married, Married-civ-spouse) */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation (e.g., Adm-clerical, Exec-managerial) */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship (e.g., Not-in-family, Husband, Wife) */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the native country (e.g., United-States, Cuba) */,
  "income_bracket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income bracket (e.g., <=50k, >50k) */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the individual */,
  "veteran_status" TEXT /* Veteran status of the individual */,
  "migration_status" TEXT /* Migration status of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_bracket_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_bracket_id") REFERENCES income_brackets ("income_bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workclass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution */,
  "degree_earned" TEXT /* Degree earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of employment */,
  "employment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_details" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of income */,
  "income_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of income */,
  "income_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_details_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the native country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "income_bracket_name" TEXT /* Name of the income bracket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_bracket_id")
)
